name: Remove Baseline
description: Remove channel baseline means from an epoched or continuous EEG dataset.

inputs.name: timerange
inputs.description: Baseline latency range [min max] in ms (e.g. [-100 0]). Empty = whole epoch.

inputs.name: pointrange
inputs.description: Baseline points vector (e.g. 1:56). Overwritten by timerange.

inputs.name: chanlist
inputs.description: List of channels to process (e.g. [1:32]). Default is all.
